case_title: NEVILLE WRIGHT VS. GAETANI REAL ESTATE

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-08-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WRIGHT, NEVILLE AS TO DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE STATED. HEARING DATE ON PROOF OF SERVICE IS DECEMBER 7, 2017. SERVED OCT-17-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-08-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAR-08-17 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF NEVILLE WRIGHT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE IS PRESETN, REPRESETED BY SEBASTIAN GAETANI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
